H2_backdating_beyond_detection.stock_adjust_and_production_yield_limit: No independent durable visibility timestamp exists for historical STOCK_ADJUST or PRODUCTION_YIELD rows.

H3_line_recipe_snapshot_drift.rationale: The MAC audit replays each line from recipe_snapshot_json; it does not substitute the current product or modifier recipe.

H4_mac_engine_code_drift.rationale: Current MAC, sale-time recipe MAC, legacy last-wins MAC, full FIFO, and direct FIFO were replayed. Direct FIFO matches only two lines and does not explain the primary drift.
